name: Spinach Beef Bake
recipeIngredient: 10 oz frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained (2 packages)
can cream of celery soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the beef and drain.
2. Add mushrooms, onion, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
3. Stir in spinach, soup, sour cream, and rice until well combined.
4. Transfer mixture to a greased 2-1/2 qt baking dish.
5. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the top.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes or until rice is tender.
